## Which App?
Which Shiny app is affected? (e.g., RCT Power Calculator, Gini Explorer)

## Language
- [ ] R Shiny
- [ ] Python Shiny

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the app
2. Set parameters to '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What should happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happens.

## Environment
- R/Python version:
- Browser:
- OS:
